title: cynodon cruciatus
intro: Cynodon cruciatus, also known as button grass, is a type of grass native to tropical and subtropical regions. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are said to help treat various health issues. The health benefits associated with Cynodon cruciatus include the reduction of fever, relief from pain and swelling, and the treatment of respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. The herbal preparations of Cynodon cruciatus typically involve the use of the plant's leaves, stems, and roots in the form of teas, infusions, and decoctions, although further research is needed to confirm the effectiveness and safety of these preparations.
